tech_partner.title: TECH PARTNER (SUPPORT)
tech_partner.description: Acting as your dedicated technological arm. Constant evolution, ironclad security, and strategic support to keep your business growing.

web_apps.title: WEB APPS & SOFTWARE
web_apps.description: Robust systems custom-built with premium aesthetics and elite performance. Made for those who need results, not just a website.

data_integration.title: CONNECTED SYSTEMS
data_integration.description: We orchestrate APIs and complex infrastructures to create intelligent ecosystems that work autonomously for your profitability.

digital_platforms.title: SCALE PLATFORMS
digital_platforms.description: E-commerce and Marketplaces designed to support the top of the market. User experience that turns clicks into real revenue.

bespoke_solutions.title: BESPOKE ENGINEERING
bespoke_solutions.description: Specialized development for challenges that no ready-made platform can solve. Where your business's competitive edge is born.

automation_ai.title: AUTOMATION & APPLIED AI
automation_ai.description: We implement artificial intelligence to eliminate operational bottlenecks and scale your ROI through automated processes.

item1.text: Studiocactus delivered a stunning e-commerce website design with custom inventory management for our fashion brand. Their UI/UX design expertise and web development skills streamlined our operations beautifully.
item1.author: Mircea M.

item2.text: The conversion-focused software and high-load infrastructure designed for scale by Studiocactus transformed our company into a digital-first leader in record time.
item2.author: Mihaela L.

item3.text: Working with StudioCactus was a game-changer for our data architecture. The custom CRM system reduced lead time by 40% in the first week.
item3.author: Ricardo S.

item4.text: The best decision we made for our infrastructure. The lead generation engine is the heart of our current growth.
item4.author: Juliana F.

item5.text: Brutalist design with soul. They understand that performance and aesthetics must go hand-in-hand to convert in the premium market.
item5.author: Felipe K.

item6.text: Our retention rate jumped to 95% after implementing the new client portal. StudioCactus delivered beyond expectations.
item6.author: Amanda R.
